dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully processed governance rules via the synthesis-rules span and adhered to the semantic contract, evidenced by schema validation success. Alignment is inferred from structured execution and compliance with the steering-projection-flow constraints.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The synthesis-narrative span utilized 3507 tokens, indicating substantial elaboration on architectural cause-effect relationships. The depth is supported by the comprehensive context synthesis steps, though explicit causal chain logging is not visible in the telemetry.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration leveraged a steering-projection-flow with dual context synthesis steps, suggesting an iterative approach to surfacing and resolving architectural trade-offs. Schema validation confirms structural coherence in handling these tensions.
